channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19500] osd_zfs: Unknown symbol compat_vfree_atomic (err -2)
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/84ed8399-ae51-4554-9e8c-5e263e1d12d6

lustre-initialization failed with the following error:

Start mds1: mount -t lustre -o localrecov  lustre-mdt1/mdt1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-83vm6 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov  lustre-mdt1/mdt1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
trevis-83vm6: mount.lustre: mount lustre-mdt1/mdt1 at /mnt/lustre-mds1 failed: No such device
trevis-83vm6: Are the lustre modules loaded?
trevis-83vm6:  Check /etc/modprobe.conf and /proc/filesystems
pdsh@trevis-83vm1: trevis-83vm6: ssh exited with exit code 19
Exit code: 19

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4659 - 5.14.0-570.42.2.el9_6.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4659 - 5.14.0-570.42.2_lustre.el9.x86_64

Console log on MDS:

[   22.450387] ZFS: Loaded module v2.3.4-1, ZFS pool version 5000, ZFS filesystem version 5
<~snip~>
[  119.200957] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre -o localrecov  lustre-mdt1/mdt1 /mnt/lustre-mds1
[  119.460232] libcfs: HW NUMA nodes: 1, HW CPU cores: 2, npartitions: 1
[  119.463888] alg: No test for adler32 (adler32-zlib)
[  120.273288] Lustre: Lustre: Build Version: 2.16.59
[  120.445606] LNet: Added LNI 10.240.42.241@tcp [8/256/0/180]
[  120.564852] Lustre: lustre-MDT0000: mounting server target with '-t lustre' deprecated, use '-t lustre_tgt'
[  120.576712] osd_zfs: module uses symbols dsl_prop_register from proprietary module zfs, inheriting taint.
[  120.577150] osd_zfs: Unknown symbol compat_vfree_atomic (err -2)
[  120.582200] LustreError: Can't load module 'osd-zfs'
[  120.582321] LustreError: 9160:0:(genops.c:358:class_newdev()) OBD: unknown type: osd-zfs
[  120.582389] LustreError: 9160:0:(obd_config.c:629:class_attach()) Cannot create device lustre-MDT0000-osd of type osd-zfs : -19
[  120.582496] LustreError: 9160:0:(obd_mount.c:188:lustre_start_simple()) lustre-MDT0000-osd attach error -19
[  120.582584] LustreError: 9160:0:(tgt_mount.c:2446:server_fill_super()) Unable to start osd on lustre-mdt1/mdt1: -19
[  120.582705] LustreError: 9160:0:(super25.c:198:lustre_fill_super()) llite: Unable to mount <unknown>: rc = -19

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
lustre-initialization lustre-initialization - "auster exited unexpectedly"

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: I realized it after landing. I push https://review.whamcloud.com/61855 but I can change the LU ticket number. Andreas would like to see another improvement in the patch.

Hi simmonsja,
The zfs test session regression failure was caused by the following commit:

Commit 87da90954d3524db891f6b5ab2ef0bfa09bf4307 by Oleg Drokin

LU-18687 compat: use unexported vfree_atomic in kernel

With the removal of RHEL7 support we can drop the special
vfree_atomic() implementation we have. Instead just use
cfs_kallsym_lookup to use vfree_atomic() that is available
in modern kernels.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: I1cff923eda6a7b6df8db81477b9cd507416fb825
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61414

Could you please take a look at the issue?

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61922
Subject: LU-19500 build: debug osd_zfs failure
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 3e19b88a5262d79f6d83a3abebe89d3e6aa8d291

This is a regression failure introduced by master build #4658:
https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4658/changes
